artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for task 616 - archive-task.sh Step C TODO.md cleanup fix
Fixed Step C Python heredoc with line-by-line block removal anchored on ^### N. pattern
Synced identical fix from primary copy

completion_data.completion_summary: Fixed archive-task.sh Step C by replacing a Python regex that matched a non-existent '- #N:' format with a line-by-line block removal anchored on '^### N. ' to match the actual TODO.md block format. Both the primary script and extension copy were updated and verified identical.

memory_candidates.content: archive-task.sh Step C removes task blocks from TODO.md using line-by-line Python scanning anchored on '^### N. ' (literal dot + space after number). The || true guard makes this best-effort so archival continues even if cleanup fails. Both .claude/scripts/archive-task.sh and .claude/extensions/core/scripts/archive-task.sh are byte-identical copies that must be kept in sync when modified.
